series_metadata.series_description: Records are minutes of the conference and public hearing meeting of the Board of Building Standards.

retention_rules.disposition: Microform: Transfer microfilm to Archives ; Paper: Retain until records superseded by new information or until records are no longer created by this agency, then microfilm records. After microfilm has been checked for quality and completeness, destroy hard copy records., Microform: Archives ; Paper: Wastepaper
